'''Bendak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal, who was tracked by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Sathiemon]]. Bendak tried to hide in a deep hole in the ground, but Fett located him. When a group of hired mercenaries cornered Fett and tried to kill him, Fett killed Bendak, switched clothes with him, and launched him out of the hole using the [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. Thanks to this ruse, and due to the fact that Bendak looked remotely similar to Fett, the mercenaries assumed that they had killed Fett.

[[File:Bloodties5cover.jpg|thumb|left|160px|Bendak's body with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] armor.]]
